notes: Cross-referenced validation of all modes using Marcos Highway from Masinag/Antipolo to Cubao/Santolan, including Rizal province extensions via Rodriguez and Tikling. Sources: LTFRB UV Express DB, LTFRB bus/jeepney franchise data, Cubao terminal data, LRT-2 feeder data, P2P operator data, OSM, Moovit, transit blogs, community sources.

routes.route_name: Cogeo — Araneta Cubao via Marcos Highway
routes.notes: LTFRB code T247. Long-running traditional jeepney route. Competes with LRT-2 + shuttle combo. Modern jeepney variant (MPUJ-033) routes via Aurora Blvd/Katipunan — different alignment. Sources: LTFRB, LRT2-feeder, Cubao terminal, community.

routes.destination: SM City Masinag, Antipolo LRT-2 Station
routes.frequency_notes: Every ~5 minutes, all day; ~20 min trip
routes.notes: Highest-frequency jeepney on Marcos Highway. Serves as surface shuttle between two LRT-2 rail termini. No confirmed LTFRB route code — may operate under T247 sub-franchise. Sources: Moovit (5-min headway), LRT-2 feeder analysis.
Short intra-Rizal segment. Marikina to Antipolo via Marcos Hwy; Marikina-Pasig LRT-2 station en route. Sources: community, Moovit.
Paenaan is a barangay in Antipolo deeper than Masinag. Also served via LRT-2 Antipolo + e-jeep/jeepney from SM Masinag. Sources: community/Moovit.
Mambugan is a barangay in Antipolo city on Marcos Highway. Single source (community). Orphan route.
Short feeder from Antipolo subdivision to Marikina. Bagong Nayon II is a subdivision on Marcos Highway. Sources: community/Moovit.
Distinct from Cogeo route. Padilla is a barangay in Antipolo near Cogeo. Also served by UV Express UVE-C67. Sources: LTFRB UV Express, Cubao terminal data, community.

routes.route_name: Cogeo — Cubao (Modern Jeepney, via Aurora Blvd/Katipunan)
routes.notes: MPUJ-033 from LTFRB modernization database. IMPORTANT: routes via Aurora Blvd/Katipunan, NOT Marcos Highway. Different alignment from traditional T247. Included here as alternative routing for same O/D pair.

routes.route_name: Cogeo — Cubao UV Express via Marcos Highway
routes.notes: UVE-C66. LTFRB UV Express franchise data. Flat fare ₱28. Sources: LTFRB UV Express DB.

routes.route_name: Cubao-Padilla UV Express via Ermin Garcia, Marcos Highway
routes.destination: Ermin Garcia / Cogeo via Marcos Highway
routes.notes: UVE-C67. Reverse of UVE-C66. Flat fare ₱35. Sources: LTFRB UV Express DB.

routes.route_name: Cubao — Montalban Central Terminal UV Express
routes.notes: UVE-QC-04. Rodriguez (Montalban) is at the northeastern end of Marcos Highway. Flat fare ₱36. Sources: LTFRB UV Express DB, Cubao terminal data.

routes.route_name: Antipolo — Ayala Center UV Express (via Marcos Highway)
routes.notes: UVE-RIZ-01. One of the busiest Rizal-Makati routes. Multiple variants including via C5 (UVE-RIZ-02). Flat fare ₱40. Sources: LTFRB UV Express DB.

routes.route_name: Antipolo — Ayala Center UV Express (via C5)
routes.notes: UVE-RIZ-02. Alternate routing via C5 for same O/D as UVE-RIZ-01. Uses Marcos Hwy from Antipolo then diverges to C5 at Marikina area. Flat fare ₱40. Sources: LTFRB UV Express DB.
UVE-RIZ-03. Shorter than Antipolo–Ayala. Megamall is on EDSA Shaw border area. Sources: LTFRB UV Express DB.

routes.route_name: Antipolo — EDSA Shaw Blvd. UV Express
routes.notes: UVE-RIZ-04. Flat fare ₱31. Sources: LTFRB UV Express DB.

routes.route_name: SM Masinag — Ayala Center UV Express
routes.notes: UVE-RIZ-05. Shorter than full Antipolo–Ayala (originates at Masinag, not deeper Antipolo). Flat fare ₱37. Sources: LTFRB UV Express DB.
UVE-RIZ-10. Reverse of UVE-QC-04. Flat fare ₱36. Rodriguez is at the far northeast of Marcos Highway. Sources: LTFRB UV Express DB.

routes.route_name: Tanay — EDSA Shaw Blvd. UV Express
routes.notes: UVE-RIZ-11. Long cross-provincial route; Tanay is deep in Rizal province beyond Tikling Junction. Flat fare ₱78. Sources: LTFRB UV Express DB.
UVE-RIZ-12. Morong is east of Tikling Junction. Flat fare ₱66. Sources: LTFRB UV Express DB.

routes.route_name: Robinsons Cainta — EDSA Central (Starmall) UV Express
routes.notes: UVE-C68. Routing ambiguous — may use Marcos Highway via Santolan or Felix Ave via Ortigas Ave Ext. Cainta is on Felix Ave, not directly on Marcos Hwy. Sources: LTFRB UV Express DB.

routes.origin: SM City Masinag, Antipolo LRT-2 Station
routes.frequency_notes: Weekdays only; AM departures from Masinag: 5:00, 5:30, 6:00, 6:30, 7:00, 7:30, 8:30, 10:30 AM; PM returns from One Ayala: 4:30–9:00 PM multiple trips
routes.notes: RRCG Transport. Regular ₱140, discounted ₱112. Beep Card accepted. No weekend service. Key mid-point: Ayala Malls Feliz on Marcos Hwy near Santolan. Sources: Sakay (P2P_LIVE_RRCG_MASINAG), RRCG website, P2P DB.
RRCG Transport. Extension of Masinag route originating from Robinsons Antipolo (deeper Antipolo). Sources: P2P DB, RRCG data.

routes.origin: Sierra Valley / Robinsons Cainta, Cainta, Rizal
routes.frequency_notes: Weekdays; AM peak departures from Cainta; PM peak returns
routes.notes: RRCG Transport. ₱90 regular / ₱72 discounted. Optional Galleria stop ₱60/₱48. Cainta is on Felix Ave/Ortigas Ave Ext, not Marcos Highway — but included as adjacent Rizal corridor P2P. Sources: P2P DB.
LTFRB Route 9. Introduced/reinforced after LRT-2 Antipolo station opened to augment LRT-2 capacity. Sources: LTFRB bus data, OSM (OSM-BUS-3 equivalent), transit blogs.
LTFRB Route 8. Primary bus connection to Rodriguez/Montalban. Sources: LTFRB bus data, transit blogs (blog-8).
OSM-BUS-3. Confirmed in OSM transit relations. Long cross-city route from Rizal to Quiapo via Marcos Hwy and España Blvd. Full stop list unavailable. Sources: OSM transit data.
OSM-BUS-55. Uses Marcos Highway from Antipolo then diverts through Ortigas area to BGC/McKinley. Sources: OSM transit data.

routes.route_name: Montalban — Baclaran City Bus via EDSA & Aurora Blvd
routes.notes: CITY-MALTC-001. Uses Marcos Highway NCR segment then switches to Aurora Blvd and EDSA southbound. Sources: LTFRB bus data.
